debug_info.goal:
pbar : Pose
S : Euc(3)
w : Euc(2)
z1 : HasFDerivAt (fun x => (rotprojRM (x.ofLp 1) (x.ofLp 2) (x.ofLp 0)) S) (GlobalTheorem.rotprojRM' S) pbar.innerParams
⊢ GlobalTheorem.rotproj_inner' pbar S w =
    (fderivInnerCLM ℝ
          ((rotprojRM (pbar.innerParams.ofLp 1) (pbar.innerParams.ofLp 2) (pbar.innerParams.ofLp 0)) S, w)).comp
      (ContinuousLinearMap.prod (GlobalTheorem.rotprojRM' S) 0)

failed_attempts:
ext v
    simp only [rotproj_inner', grad, ContinuousLinearMap.comp_apply, fderivInnerCLM_apply,
      ContinuousLinearMap.prod_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.zero_apply, real_inner_comm,
      inner_zero_right, add_zero, EuclideanSpace.basisFun, Basis.constr_apply,
      EuclideanSpace.toBasis_repos_apply, EuclideanSpace.toBasis_apply, Basis.coe_reindex,
      Function.comp_apply, Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.vecTail, Matrix.cons_val_one,
      Matrix.cons_val_two, Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_one, Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail]
    have h_deriv := z1.hasDerivAt
    rw [← inner_sum_left]
    refine congrArg (inner · w) ?_
    rw [← EuclideanSpace.sum_repr v]
    simp only [h_deriv, ContinuousLinearMap.map_sum, ContinuousLinearMap.map_smul_apply,
      HasDerivAt.deriv, EuclideanSpace.basisFun, Basis.repr_self, Finsupp.smul_single,
      smul_eq_mul, mul_one, Finsupp.sum_single_index]
    rfl

ext v; simp only [rotproj_inner', grad, EuclideanSpace.basisFun, Basis.constr_apply,
      ContinuousLinearMap.coe_comp, ContinuousLinearMap.prod_apply, fderivInnerCLM_apply,
      Function.comp_apply, add_zero, inner_zero_right, Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_one,
      Matrix.cons_val_two, Matrix.tail_cons, Matrix.head_cons, rotprojRM]
    sorry

sorry
  rw [step]
  exact z1.inner (hasFDerivAt_const w pbar.innerParams)
ext x; simp [rotproj_inner', fderivInnerCLM, ContinuousLinearMap.prod_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.comp_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.zero_apply, add_zero]
ext; simp [rotproj_inner', fderivInnerCLM, rotprojRM', ContinuousLinearMap.comp_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.prod_apply, fderivInnerCLM_apply]

sorry
  rw [step]
  exact z1.inner (hasFDerivAt_const w pbar.innerParams)
ext i; fin_cases i <;> simp [rotproj_inner', rotprojRM', fderivInnerCLM_apply, real_inner_comm]

sorry
  rw [step]
  exact z1.inner (hasFDerivAt_const w pbar.innerParams)

ext h
    simp only [rotproj_inner', fderivInnerCLM_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.comp_apply,
      ContinuousLinearMap.prod_apply, prod.mk_zero, inner_zero_right, add_zero,
      EuclideanSpace.basisFun, Basis.constr_apply, LinearMap.coe_toContinuousLinearMap,
      Basis.coe_basisFun, inner_sum_left, inner_smul_left]
    have h_sum : h = ∑ i, h i • EuclideanSpace.basisFun i :=
      (EuclideanSpace.basisFun (Fin 3) ℝ).sum_repr h
    have h_apply := ContinuousLinearMap.congr_arg (rotprojRM' S) h_sum
    simp only [map_sum, map_smul, EuclideanSpace.basisFun, Basis.coe_basisFun] at h_apply
    rw [h_apply, inner_sum_left]
    refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun i _ ↦ ?_)
    rw [inner_smul_left]
    congr
    have h_deriv := z1.fderiv
    have h_partial := fderiv_partial (fun x => rotprojRM (x 1) (x 2) (x 0) S) pbar.innerParams i
    rw [h_deriv] at h_partial
    rw [← h_partial]
    match i with
    | 0 => sorry
    | 1 => sorry
    | 2 => sorry
ext x; simp [rotproj_inner', fderivInnerCLM, ContinuousLinearMap.comp_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.prod_apply]
ext; simp [rotproj_inner', fderivInnerCLM_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.prod_apply, EuclideanSpace.basisFun, Basis.constr_apply]
